name: check-overdue-invoices
description: Lists supplier invoices whose net due date is in the past. Optionally filters by company code, vendor, or a maximum days-overdue.
utterances: List overdue invoices for company code 1710
Any invoices more than 30 days late
Show unpaid invoices past their due date

parameters.name: companyCode
parameters.description: S/4HANA Company Code (e.g. 1710). If omitted, all company codes the user is authorized for are returned.
parameters.extractionHint: Extract 4-digit company code from phrases like 'for CoCo 1710' or 'company 1010'.

parameters.name: supplierId
parameters.extractionHint: Match on vendor code or, if a company name is given, resolve via BusinessPartner action first.

parameters.name: minDaysOverdue
parameters.description: Minimum days past NetDueDate to include. Default 1.

input.$filter: PaymentBlockingReason eq '' and NetDueDate lt now() sub duration('P{{ minDaysOverdue | default: 1 }}D'){% if companyCode %} and CompanyCode eq '{{ companyCode }}'{% endif %}{% if supplierId %} and InvoicingParty eq '{{ supplierId }}'{% endif %}
